rules.rule_text:
rule php_anuna
{
	meta:
		author = "Vlad https://github.com/vlad-s"
		date = "2016/07/18"
		description = "Catches a PHP Trojan"

	strings:
		$a = /<\?php \$[a-z]+ = '/
		$b = /\$[a-z]+=explode\(chr\(\([0-9]+[-+][0-9]+\)\)/
		$c = /\$[a-z]+=\([0-9]+[-+][0-9]+\)/
		$d = /if \(!function_exists\('[a-z]+'\)\)/

	condition:
		all of them
}
